settings.heading: Double the Piercing, Double the Impact
settings.subheading:
From sleek minimalism to bold statement piercings, there is a fit for every individual's style. Here is a quick overview of the different types of lip piercings which also aims to help you make an informed decision when choosing to pierce your lips. These piercings often appeal to those who know exactly what they’re looking for and appreciate unique styles.

JEWELLERY: Industrial Barbells

STANDARD SIZE: 14G (1.6mm) and 35-38mm length bars

DOWNSIZE: Downsizing is not generally required for these piercings, as the elongated look of the jewellery is what makes the piercing special.

HEALING TIME: 6-12 months or sometimes longer for full healing as this piercing involves 2 areas being pierced.

PAIN LEVEL: 7-8/10 on the pain scale due toe 2 areas being pierced at once.

AFTERCARE: Clean your piercings 2-3 a day with Saline solution and restrain from fiddling with the piercing. Avoid sleeping on the pierced side and it is best to wait until the piercing has healed before deciding to get another one. Avoid fiddling with the piercing and moving it around.

PRO-TIP: As industrial barbells have the length between the 2 pierced areas, a great way to enhance this is by choosing pieces that have designs in the centre bar. This can add flare and personal touch to your ear stack
